notes: Calibrated on 114 Error-band pairs from tiling-report-2026-06-14.md. Zero true duplicates found at 0.90 threshold. Findings: entity pages (Tensor employees) cluster at 0.92-0.98 (distinct — similar bio format); concept-source pairs cluster at 0.90-0.94 (distinct — expected, page created from source); same-domain concepts (DiscountCard cluster, UpdateSystem cluster) cluster at 0.90-0.95 (similar — different angles, cross-links added). Raised error to 0.95 and review to 0.92 to reduce noise from 5117 to ~40 pairs.
